1: 2:Input: problem description from the user puser, max num of conversation rounds K procedure SOLVE(puser, K)
3:prompt ← Prompter(puser)
4:for round = 1, 2, ., K do
5:response ← LLM(prompt)
6:result ← Checker(response)
7:if result.is ValidFinalSolution() then
8:return (result.solution)
9:end if
10:memory.store(result)
11:ctrl_signal ← ToTController(memory)
12: 13:prompt ← Prompter(memory, ctrl_signal)
end for
14:return (nil)
5:end procedure
